body:

 Hello,





   I called Oscar Blandi and they can highlight my hair
tomorrow at 4:15...this is the latest, is this ok? I will have a senior
stylist so he must be good.





 Thanks again for the advice on Julian and with this whole situation... you make everything much better.





Dana B
